0.text: Mild emphysematous changes in both lungs

1.text: Significant peribronchial thickening in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Areas of tubular bronchiectasis in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

3.text: Areas of tubular bronchiectasis in the lower lobes of both lungs

4.text: Increased peripheral micronodular opacities in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

5.text: Increased peripheral micronodular opacities in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

6.text: Increased peripheral micronodular opacities in the mediobasal segment of the right lung

7.text: Increases in ground glass density in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

8.text: Increases in ground glass density in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

9.text: Increases in ground glass density in the mediobasal segment of the right lung

10.text: Band-like pleuroparenchymal fibrotic density increases in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

11.text: Band-like pleuroparenchymal fibrotic density increases in the lower lobes of both lungs
